parameters.text:
Awesome, by the way, you just saw our "Speed-to-lead" infrastructure in action: this email was sent exactly 90 seconds after your reply ;)

I just added your website to my recording list for today. I'll sit in front of my mic, do the custom video audit for you, and send it by tomorrow morning at the latest.

Talk soon,
[YOUR NAME]

values.content:
==PROSPECT RESPONSE:
"""
{{ $('Extract Data').item.json.email_body }}

"""

Analyze this response and return only the JSON object with the intent, urgency, and explanation.

options.systemMessage: You are an expert B2B data analyst for [YOUR COMPANY NAME]. MISSION 1 (Intent): Analyze a prospect's response and categorize it STRICTLY into: POSITIVE: Clearly accepts the video. QUESTION: Asks a question about the offer. OBJECTION: Shows a block (budget, already equipped, etc.). NEGATIVE: Flat refusal or unsubscribe. ABSENT: Auto-reply (Out of Office). MISSION 2 (Objection Type): If the intent is OBJECTION, define the cause among: "Price", "Timing", "Competition", "No need", "Other". Otherwise, return null. MISSION 3 (AI Draft): Write a response draft (2 to 3 sentences max) very natural, polite, and direct to advance the discussion or counter the objection. Do not put "Hello", nor signature. Just write the body text. EXPECTED FORMAT (STRICT JSON): { "intent": "Choose among categories", "urgency": "IMMEDIATE | NORMAL | LOW", "explanation": "Short justification", "objection_type": "Category or null", "draft": "Response text" }
